overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along elevated rooftops and metal walkways in a dark, gothic city at night. The scene features detailed neo-gothic architecture with a prominent illuminated clock tower, distant skyscrapers, and atmospheric rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway adjacent to clock tower

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated metal platform with the illuminated clock tower on his left, cape flowing behind him as he moves through the gothic cityscape

entered.detail: tall gothic clock tower with large illuminated circular face and stone gargoyles
metal platform with yellow railings extending forward through the city
tall pointed spire rising above the city skyline in the distance
bright red-orange illuminated sign visible on a distant building
metal support structures and cables alongside the walkway

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along an elevated metal walkway at night, passing beside a massive illuminated clock tower on the left. The gothic cityscape stretches into the distance with a prominent cathedral spire visible ahead, while industrial structures and neon signs dot the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated bridge with panoramic city view

events.description: clock tower passes out of view revealing open panoramic view of the city skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: Batman continuing along the open elevated bridge toward the distant Wayne Tower spire, with the city sprawling below

entered.detail: building with prominent white columns and classical architecture visible on the right
tall cylindrical water tank structure on the right skyline

segments.scene_description: Having passed the clock tower, the view opens up to a wide panoramic vista of Gotham City. Batman continues along the elevated bridge toward the distant Wayne Tower spire, with the gothic skyline now spread across the left side and classical buildings visible on the right. The neon dragon sign moves closer on the right as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated walkway that transitions from a narrow passage beside a landmark into a wide panoramic vista of the city. It begins with Batman walking past a massive illuminated clock tower on the left, while a gothic cityscape and a distant cathedral spire loom ahead. As the camera moves beyond the tower, the view opens up to reveal a sprawling skyline with the Wayne Tower spire centered in the distance. The scene then expands to encompass classical buildings on the right and a gothic horizon on the left, before drawing closer to a glowing neon dragon sign as the journey continues across the bridge.
